title: MW: More Structures
description: Adds new structures to the Management Wanted mod by OVDR
body:
Adds 8 new structures to the Management Wanted mod

## Storage
- Balora Storage
- Endo Storage
- Fredbear Storage
- Funtime Storage
## Trash Zones
- Funtime Foxy & Baby Trash
- Funtime Freddy Trash
## Other
- Mimic Place
- Pizza Place Entrance Door

(Note that exept Mimic Place, every strucures spawn only in Faz Hills)

### More coming soon !

I have good and bad news, first , am gonna try to re work on the mod!!! , i dont have any devs tho.... but am gonna try to find one , stay tune!
